'''dhasomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hiccups|hiccups]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hiccups|hiccups]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhasomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæsemeth|dhæsemeth]] || [[word:dhæsemej|dhæsemej]] || [[word:dhæsemesh|dhæsemesh]] || [[word:dhæseme|dhæseme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhasosomoth|dhasosomoth]] || [[word:dhasosomoj|dhasosomoj]] || [[word:dhasosomosh|dhasosomosh]] || [[word:dhasosomo|dhasosomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhasomoth|dhasomoth]] || [[word:dhasomoj|dhasomoj]] || [[word:dhasomosh|dhasomosh]] || [[word:dhasomo|dhasomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhasofmoth|dhasofmoth]] || [[word:dhasofmoj|dhasofmoj]] || [[word:dhasofmosh|dhasofmosh]] || [[word:dhasofmof|dhasofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhasomotho|dhasomotho]] || [[word:dhasomojo|dhasomojo]] || [[word:dhasomosho|dhasomosho]] || [[word:dhasomoko|dhasomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhasomoth|dhasomoth]] || [[word:dhasomoj|dhasomoj]] || [[word:dhasomosh|dhasomosh]] || [[word:dhasomo|dhasomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhasomothol|dhasomothol]] || [[word:dhasomojol|dhasomojol]] || [[word:dhasomoshol|dhasomoshol]] || [[word:dhasomokol|dhasomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhasomothotho|dhasomothotho]] || [[word:dhasomojojo|dhasomojojo]] || [[word:dhasomoshosho|dhasomoshosho]] || [[word:dhasomoko|dhasomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhasomothon|dhasomothon]] || [[word:dhasomojon|dhasomojon]] || [[word:dhasomoshon|dhasomoshon]] || [[word:dhasomokon|dhasomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhasomothoro|dhasomothoro]] || [[word:dhasomojoro|dhasomojoro]] || [[word:dhasomoshoro|dhasomoshoro]] || [[word:dhasomokoro|dhasomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
